headline: Is Kraft Heinz (KHC) Now A Potential Opportunity After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Kraft Heinz is starting to look like value or a value trap, you are not alone. The answer really comes down to what you are paying for its current fundamentals. The stock recently closed at US$22.58. Returns over 7 days, 30 days, year to date, 1 year and 5 years were an 8.0% decline, 9.0% decline, 7.4% decline, 20.5% decline and 26.7% decline respectively. This has pushed many investors to ask if expectations around risk and reward have shifted too far. Recent...
